Part.Source:
&HojeData = serverdate()
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod &FilRaz = FilRaz Exit EndFor
Do 'OpenDocument'
&CellRow = 1
Do 'WriteColumnTitles' Do 'CloseDocument'
Sub 'OpenDocument' If &FilenameFisico.IsEmpty() &Random = Random() * 10000 &FilenameVirtual ="ExportCatalogo-" + &Random.ToString().Trim() + !".xlsx" &ExcelDocument.Open(&FilenameVirtual) &ExcelDocument.AutoFit = 1 Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear() Else &ExcelDocument.Open(&FilenameFisico) &ExcelDocument.AutoFit = 1 Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear() EndIf EndSub
Sub 'WriteColumnTitles' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Color = 14 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Text = "CATALOGO" &CellRow+=1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Color = 14 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Text = "EMPRESA"
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Color = 14 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Text = &FilRaz &CellRow+=1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Text = "Código" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Text = "Nome" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,3).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,3).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,3).Text = "Tabela N°" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,4).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,4).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,4).Text = "Status" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,5).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,5).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,5).Text = "Atualizado em"
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,6).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,6).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,6).Text = "UF"
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,7).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,7).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,7).Text = "Operação" EndIf
Do 'WriteData' &CellRow+=2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Color = 14 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Text = "PRODUTOS" &CellRow +=1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Text = "Código"
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Text = "Referência"
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,3).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,3).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,3).Text = "Nome do produto"
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,4).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,4).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,4).Text = "Grupo"
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,5).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,5).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,5).Text = "UND"
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,6).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,6).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,6).Text = "NCM"
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,7).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,7).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,7).Text = "Embalagem"
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,8).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,8).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,8).Text = "Peso (KG)"
If &CtlMar = Status_SimNao.Sim &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,9).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,9).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,9).Text = "MARCA" &FirstColumn = 9 Else &FirstColumn = 8 EndIf Do 'TitulosProdutos' Do 'Produtos' EndSub
Sub 'WriteData' For each order EmpCod CtlCod CtlNom Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CtlCod = &CtlCod &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Number = CtlCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Text = CtlNom &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,3).Text = TabCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,4).Text = CtlSts.EnumerationDescription() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,5).Text = dtoc(&Today) If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,6).Text = &UfeCod &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,7).Text = &LctCod.ToFormattedString() Endif
&TabCod = TabCod &CtlTabPrmCod = CtlTabPrmCod &CtlDtaLan = CtlDtaLan &CtlCol1 = CtlCol1 &CtlCol2 = CtlCol2 &CtlCol3 = CtlCol3 &CtlCol4 = CtlCol4 &CtlCol5 = CtlCol5 &CtlMar = CtlMar &CtlTabAnt = CtlTabAnt exit Endfor EndSub
Sub 'CloseDocument' &ExcelDocument.Save() Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Close() EndSub
Sub 'CheckStatus' If (&ExcelDocument.ErrCode <> 0) &FilenameVirtual = "" &ErrorMessage = &ExcelDocument.ErrDescription &ExcelDocument.Close() Return EndIf EndSub
Sub 'TitulosProdutos' &FirstColumn += 1 For each Order EmpCod,TabCod,TabColCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TabCod = &TabCod
if not TabColNom.IsEmpty() &nome = TabColNom Else &nome = 'Col.' + trim(str(TabColCod)) EndiF
Do Case Case &CtlCol1 = true and TabColCod = 1 &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = &nome
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = (&nome)+' C/Imposto' EndIf
Case &CtlCol2 = true and TabColCod = 2 &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = &nome
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = (&nome)+' C/Imposto' EndIf
Case &CtlCol3 = true and TabColCod = 3 &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = &nome
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = (&nome)+' C/Imposto' EndIf Case &CtlCol4 = true and TabColCod = 4 &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = &nome
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = (&nome)+' C/Imposto' EndIf Case &CtlCol5 = true and TabColCod = 5 &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = &nome
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = (&nome)+' C/Imposto' EndIf EndCase EndFor EndSub
Sub 'Produtos'
For each CatalogoProduto,Produto Order EmpCod,CtlCod,ProSts, GrupHie, ProNom when &AlfabeticaGrupo = 'G' Order EmpCod,CtlCod,ProSts, ProNom when &AlfabeticaGrupo = 'N'
Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CtlCod = &CtlCod Where ProSts = Status_Produto.ATIVO
&ProCod = ProCod &ProNom = ProNom &GrupNom = GrupNom.Trim().ToUpper() &MarNom = SubStr(MarNom,1,15) &ProEmbUnd = ProEmbUnd &NcmCod = NcmCod &ProQtdEmb = ProQtdEmb &ProPesLiq = ProPesLiq &ProBarRef = '' &ProBarRef = ProRef
//pegou o produto ai entra pra ver se tem codigo original ou avuso, para gerar mais de 1 registro por referencia For each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, ProBarOrd, ProBarRef Where ProGraCod = 1 Where ProBarTip = 'A' OR ProBarTip = 'O' &CellRow += 1 &ProBarRef = trim(ProBarRef) If ProBarMarCod > 0 //pega a marca do codigo e não do cadastro RetornaNomeMarca.Call(EmpCod, ProBarMarCod, &MarNom) EndIf
Do 'MontaLinhaproduto'
When none &CellRow += 1 //se não achou nenhum original ou avulso ai sim imprimi so o referencia, não imprime no for de cima pq se não ele repete um referencia/referencia Do 'MontaLinhaproduto' Endfor EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'MontaLinhaproduto'
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Text = &ProCod.ToString()
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Text = &ProBarRef
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,3).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,3).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,3).Text = &ProNom.Trim()
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,4).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,4).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,4).Text = &GrupNom.Trim()
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,5).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,5).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,5).Text = &ProEmbUnd
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,6).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,6).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,6).Text = &NcmCod.ToFormattedString()
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,7).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,7).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,7).Text = &ProQtdEmb.ToFormattedString()
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,8).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,8).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,8).Text = &ProPesLiq.ToFormattedString()
If &CtlMar = Status_SimNao.Sim
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,9).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,9).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,9).Text = &MarNom &FirstColumn = 9 Else &FirstColumn = 8 EndIf
Do 'DadosImposto'
&valor = 0 DO 'Promocao' IF &IsAchou = false Do 'PrecoTabela' eNDif
If &valor = 0
&ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,1).Text = '' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,2).Text ='' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,3).Text ='' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,4).Text ='' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,5).Text ='' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,6).Text ='' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,7).Text ='' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,8).Text ='' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,9).Text ='' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,10).Text ='' &valor = 0 &CellRow -= 1 EndIf EndSub
Sub 'DadosImposto'
For each order EmpCod, FilCod //Filial where EmpCod = &EmpCod where FilCod = &FilCod &FilBasImp = FilBasImp exit EndFor
For each order EmpCod,LctCod //Tipo Lancamento where EmpCod = &EmpCod where LctCod = &LctCod &LctBasImpCod = LctBasImpCod exit EndFor
For each order EmpCod,ProCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod where ProCod = &ProCod &ProCatCod = ProCatCod exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'Promocao' &IsAchou = false For each Order EmpCod,TabCod,ProCod,TabAltCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TabCod = &CtlTabPrmCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where TabAltCod = TabUltAlt
&FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Text = 'PROMOÇÃO'
If &CtlCol1 = true &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc1
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc1,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) If &IsImpostoCadastrado = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc1+&Moeda Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = 'Imposto não cadastrado' EndiF EndIf
If &valor = 0 &valor = TabPrc1 EndIf EndIf
If &CtlCol2 = true &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc2
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc2,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado)
If &IsImpostoCadastrado = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc2+&Moeda Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = 'Imposto não cadastrado' EndiF EndIf
If &valor = 0 &valor = TabPrc2 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol3 = true &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc3
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc3,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) If &IsImpostoCadastrado = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc3+&Moeda Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = 'Imposto não cadastrado' EndiF EndIf
If &valor = 0 &valor = TabPrc3 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol4 = true &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc4
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc4,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) If &IsImpostoCadastrado = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc4+&Moeda Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = 'Imposto não cadastrado' EndiF EndIf
If &valor = 0 &valor = TabPrc4 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol5 = true &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc5
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc5,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) If &IsImpostoCadastrado = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc5+&Moeda Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = 'Imposto não cadastrado' EndiF EndIf
If &valor = 0 &valor = TabPrc5 EndIf EndIf
&IsAchou = TRUE EndFor EndSub
Sub 'PrecoTabela'
For each Order EmpCod,TabCod,ProCod,TabAltCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TabCod = &TabCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where TabAltCod = TabUltAlt
&ComparativoTabelaMoeda = 0 &ComparativoTabColCod = 0
Do CAse CAse &CtlCol1 = true &ComparativoTabelaMoeda = TabPrc1 &ComparativoTabColCod = 1 CAse &CtlCol2 = true &ComparativoTabelaMoeda = TabPrc2 &ComparativoTabColCod = 2 CAse &CtlCol3 = true &ComparativoTabelaMoeda = TabPrc3 &ComparativoTabColCod = 3 CAse &CtlCol4 = true &ComparativoTabelaMoeda = TabPrc4 &ComparativoTabColCod = 4 CAse &CtlCol5 = true &ComparativoTabelaMoeda = TabPrc5 &ComparativoTabColCod = 5 EndCAse
&FirstColumn += 1 if ProDtaCad >= &CtlDtaLan and not &CtlDtaLan.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Text = 'LANÇAMENTO' Else if not &CtlTabAnt.IsEmpty() getTabelaAnterior.Call(&EmpCod, &CtlTabAnt, &ProCod, &ComparativoTabColCod, &valorRetornadoMoeda)
if &valorRetornadoMoeda > 0 and &ComparativoTabelaMoeda > 0 and &valorRetornadoMoeda > &ComparativoTabelaMoeda &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Text = 'BAIXOU' Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Text = '' Endif Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Bold = false &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow,&FirstColumn).Text = '' Endif EndIF
If &CtlCol1 = true &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc1
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc1,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado)
If &IsImpostoCadastrado = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc1+&Moeda Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = 'Imposto não cadastrado' EndiF EndIf
If &valor = 0 &valor = TabPrc1 EndIf EndIf
If &CtlCol2 = true &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc2
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc2,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) If &IsImpostoCadastrado = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc2+&Moeda Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = 'Imposto não cadastrado' EndiF EndIf
If &valor = 0 &valor = TabPrc2 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol3 = true &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc3
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc3,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) If &IsImpostoCadastrado = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc3+&Moeda Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = 'Imposto não cadastrado' EndiF
EndIf
If &valor = 0 &valor = TabPrc3 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol4 = true &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc4
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc4,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) If &IsImpostoCadastrado = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc4+&Moeda Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = 'Imposto não cadastrado' EndiF EndIf
If &valor = 0 &valor = TabPrc4 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol5 = true &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc5
If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim &FirstColumn += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = False &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 10 RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc5,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) If &IsImpostoCadastrado = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Number = TabPrc5+&Moeda Else &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = 'Imposto não cadastrado' EndiF EndIf
If &valor = 0 &valor = TabPrc5 EndIf EndIf EndFor EndSub
